Dianna Russini remark on husband resurfaces amid Mike Vrabel buzz
description: Dianna Russini is facing renewed scrutiny as an old joke about marrying Kevin Goldschmidt for his “big wallet” resurfaces amid controversy involving Mike Vrabel. The remark, later clarified as humor, has been widely misinterpreted online. At the same time, rumors around leaked photos and her alleged link to Vrabel continue to circulate, though unverified, keeping the debate alive across social media and sports circles.

'Dhurandhar 2' BO collection day 39: Ranveer Singh film chases 'Pushpa 2’s domestic record
description: On Day 39, Ranveer Singh’s 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is on the cusp of making history as it chases the worldwide record of SS Rajamouli’s 'Baahubali 2'. Directed by Aditya Dhar, the espionage thriller has reached a global gross of Rs. 1,772.94 crore, needing just Rs. 15.12 crore more to become the second highest-grossing Indian film ever. Domestically, the film is locked in an intense battle to dethrone 'Pushpa 2: The Rule' as the all-time India net champion.

Microsoft CEO just agreed with VP Rajesh Jha on solution to software cos’ biggest fear
description: Microsoft is addressing enterprise software industry fears about AI-driven job cuts with its Foundry platform.  The new Hosted Agents feature provides each AI agent with its own dedicated cloud sandbox, effectively treating them as licensed users. This strategy aims to maintain software license revenue by ensuring companies pay for AI agents, even as human headcount decreases.

title: LeBron, Bronny make NBA history with first father-son playoff alley-oop
description: LeBron James and Bronny James made NBA playoff history with the league’s first father-son scoring connection, as LeBron set up an alley-oop finished by Bronny in Game 3 against the Houston Rockets. Beyond the highlight, the moment underscored LeBron’s unmatched longevity, allowing their careers to overlap in a meaningful, competitive playoff setting rather than a symbolic appearance.

title: Cardi B sparks dating rumors as Stefon Diggs custody buzz grows
description: Cardi B sparks fresh dating rumors after a viral video shows her with an Atlanta-based barber, fueling online chatter. The clip arrives amid ongoing speculation about Cardi B and Patriots WR  Stefon Diggs, with unverified claims of a breakup, a DNA controversy, and a custody battle making the rounds. While fans react strongly to the viral moment, no official confirmation has been provided to support the circulating reports. Stefon Diggs also faces renewed attention as past scrutiny resurfaces. The situation highlights how quickly social media narratives around Cardi B and Stefon Diggs can spread without verified facts.

title: Starting January 1, Deloitte cuts parental leave, PTO, pension, IVF funding in US
description: Deloitte plans to reduce paid family leave from 16 to eight weeks and cut annual paid time off by 5-10 days for a segment of its US workforce starting January 1, 2027. These changes, affecting internal roles under the 'Center' talent model, aim to tailor benefits to market alignment. New pension plan contributions and adoption/surrogacy reimbursements will also cease.

title: Ronaldo’s 3 final career goals before retirement – Messi already ahead
description: Cristiano Ronaldo is entering the final phase of his career with three clear goals still driving him forward: a first World Cup title in 2026, the pursuit of 1,000 career goals, and the rare chance of playing alongside his son at Al Nassr. Even at 41, he remains central for club and country, shaping both legacy and milestones.

title: Vrabel saga: Rumours swirl over paternity of Dianna Russini’s son amid scandal
description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down as new details emerge. Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.

title: After backing Trump's child savings plan, Michael Dell's next $750 m going to hospital
description: Michael and Susan Dell have donated $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This facility will integrate AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education, with construction beginning this year and opening by 2030. The donation builds on their extensive philanthropic history and commitment to Austin's growth.
